text:

>

> 
> when in X (4.0.1 as above..) while working with rxvt's they sometimes disappear with no reason
> or notice, it mainly happens with telnet (or nc) sessions. It doesnt happen with xterm's (Eterm neither, but i havent run them for more than about 10 seconds..)	

	A fair question. Did you update your rxvt along with you new XFree 4.0.1?
	I am not running 4.0.1 but 4.0. And, it works for me. However,
that does not fix the problem.
	Anyway, I'll update my XFree and get back to you later. :)
